description_long: This is a stylish brown steampunk top hat featuring a tall, cylindrical crown with a flat top and a wide, slightly upturned brim. The front of the hat is adorned with a black lace-up panel, secured by brass eyelets, adding a distinctive Victorian flair. Around the base of the crown, there is a decorative band with a yellow and brown striped pattern, giving the hat a unique and eye-catching accent. The crown is reinforced with vertical brown leather strips, which provide both structure and visual interest. The stitching on the brim is visible and neatly done, contributing to the hat's high-quality craftsmanship. The materials appear to be a combination of leather, fabric, and metal, making it both durable and visually appealing.
description: A brown steampunk top hat with a flat crown, wide brim, brass eyelets, and a striped decorative band. Features a black lace-up front and leather accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black lace-up panel with brass eyelets and the striped band most prominently.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the vertical leather strips and the continuous striped band around the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the uninterrupted leather and fabric construction, with the striped band visible at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the leather strips and striped band, but without the lace-up panel.
attribute_brim_style: wide and flat with slight upturn
